title: Default Short Tools
description: Default Short Textures for Various Tools and Items
body:
Click [here](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/default-short-tools-bedrock-edition/) for the Bedrock Version!\
This is a simple texture pack that makes tools like swords, pickaxes, tridents etc. shorter so you can see better when playing PvP!\
The textures have been handmade, so they look clean and not strange.\
(In the pictures I forgot to add a crossbow to the display, but it is included in the pack)\
Enjoy!
